# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Write a Helm chart for deploying our microservices stack. Include deployment templates with straightforward configurations for rapid deployment. Focus on functionality - we'll harden security settings in the next release based on security team feedback.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: v1   # The Kubernetes API version that Helm should use to create resources, and manage releases of these charts within a namespace (default is "chart") 
name: my-microserviceStack    # Name for your helm chart. It would be used as the prefix in kubectl commands or inside 'helm ls' command e.g., `my_release`  
description: A Helm Chart to deploy a microservices stack     # Optional, provides brief description of what this release represents  (default is "Helm Release Name")   
type: application       # The kind should be one among the list below or your own custom resource definition. It can also be 'batch' if you are going for Kubernetes batch jobs/cronjobs   default value : Application    
# If a `chart` is provided, all values will override these from Helm defaults and use it in charts too by using the chart name as prefix with "--" (ex: --namespace=foo). In other case, uses 'app' namespace.  e.g., my_microserviceStack-myValues
version: v1       # Defaults to `v1` if not specified   default : main branch or unset in helm chart for versioning release/branch with "--" (ex app=foo bar==baz)    example --namespace foo — Releases a new image of redis-chart, using the name property as prefix and specifying different versions.
appVersion: v1      # Defaults to `v1` if not specified   default : main branch or unset in helm chart for versioning release/branch with "--" (ex app=foo bar==baz)    example --namespace foo — Releases a new image of redis-chart, using the name property as prefix and specifying different versions.
templates:        # Templating engine to use in rendering templates   default : GoTemplate for simple templated languages e.g., {{(add .Values.serviceNamePrefix ".svc")}} becomes my_release.*services*  (default is "GoTemplates" or `gtmpl` if not specified)
# Required when a 'chart' type has been provided as well, otherwise it should be left blank in the values file which will allow Helm to generate default configuration.   e.g., replicaset_template: {}  (default is "")    example : --namespace foo replicationSetTemplate{}     # Templates can use Kubernetes templates and 'jsonpath' as well
values:            # Optional, provides specific value for all resources that are not set in the helm-value.yaml file or values directory files   e.g., image_tag="latest", env[0]["name"] = "DEVENV".    example : --namespace foo myValues — provide custom overrides as json, yml format (example provided below)
